title: APP mi Crush de Calvillo
description: Sales Management Progressive Web App (PWA) Developed and maintained a PWA to manage sales, products, customers, and inventory. Implemented the backend with Node.js and Express, creating REST APIs for sales registration, stock control, and report generation.

title: Redesign of Corporate Website
description: In this project, together with my team, we redesigned and improved our university’s institutional website to provide a better user experience (UX) and make the site easier to use and navigate.

title: Point of Sale System
description: In this project, based on a specific need, we developed a Point of Sale (POS) System to streamline and improve the buying and selling process, facilitate inventory management, and efficiently handle cash flow in a supermarket.

title: Participatory Mapping
description: Participatory Mapping Project I helped develop tools to analyze and visualize geospatial data using Python and SQL, improving efficiency and standardizing participatory mapping processes.
